works.name: Pālana
works.hero: The state view, built into the same model.
works.short_description: Operational workbench; dual-pane file manager with true server-side operations, ZFS-aware cross-dataset handling, a field view of machine topology, and Forteller built in as an integrated capability.
substantive_description: Pālana is the live-state companion to Forteller's configuration push. Where Forteller manages the declarative side, Pālana provides the operational visibility: dual-pane file management with server-side operations, ZFS-aware cross-dataset handling, a topological view of the machine fleet. The deeper argument is about the relationship between configuration and visibility. Most infrastructure tooling treats one or the other. The Kṣetra-Ops pair treats both as one problem with two views.
